title: Power Modification
wikitext:
[[File:Ajuka's_skill.jpg|thumb|400px|Ajuka Beelzebub's Kankara Formula can use specialized demonic magical formulas to alter other demonic powers to change their shape, direction, and potency.]]

==Summary==
'''Power Modification''' is the ability to alter, interfere with, or modify other powers. Differing from [[Power Nullification]] or [[Statistics Amplification]], Power Modification is able to change the function of an ability in some shape or form, such as turning superhuman strength into superhuman speed. It should be noted that users must be able to interfere with the nature of the ability itself for this to be listed in their profile.

==Users==
* [[Ajuka Beelzebub]] ([[High School DxD]])
* [[Hansode Shiranui]] ([[Medaka Box]])
* [[Nadakhan]] ([[Ninjago]])
* [[Naoto Shirogane (Persona X Detective Naoto)|Naoto Shirogane]] ([[Megami Tensei|Persona]])
